scripts.dev: esbuild src/index.ts src/styles.css --bundle --outdir=dist --format=iife --platform=browser --watch && cp src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -r assets/images dist/images
scripts.build: pnpm run build:js && pnpm run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: cp src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -r assets/images dist/images
